burden.dalyPerCapita: indirect; contributes to adverse drug events and falls

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Medication count (≥5) plus assessment of potentially inappropriate medications (Beers/STOPP-START) and adverse effects

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Variable; improves with structured medication review and deprescribing

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Often recognized after adverse events; limited structured deprescribing programs
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Medication reconciliation, apply Beers/STOPP-START, deprescribe where appropriate, simplify regimens
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Fragmented prescribing and limited pharmacist integration in primary care teams
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Primary care can implement reconciliation and deprescribing with protocols
